title: InspectDeploymentReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``inspect-deployment`` (wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field; see envelope.json).

The structured result of a single read-only, depth-bounded listing probe: the resolved target, whether it exists, and the (cluster-side capped) listing.

cluster.title: Cluster
cluster.description: The cluster key the probe targeted.

ssh_target.title: Ssh Target
ssh_target.description: The ``user@host`` (or OpenSSH alias) resolved from the cluster config — the throttled destination the probe ran against.

path.title: Path
path.description: The absolute path that was probed (``REPO_DIR`` when derived from ``run_id``, else the supplied ``path``). Always strictly under the cluster scratch root.

repo_dir.title: Repo Dir
repo_dir.description: The derived ``REPO_DIR`` when the target came from ``run_id`` (``deploy_target_for(remote_path)``); ``null`` when an explicit ``path`` was probed.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The run id whose deployment was inspected, or ``null`` when an explicit ``path`` was probed.

exists.title: Exists
exists.description: Whether the target path exists on the cluster (a non-existent target is reported here, not as an error).

entries.title: Entries
entries.description: The depth-bounded listing (absolute paths), sorted, capped cluster-side. Empty when the target is absent.

truncated.title: Truncated
truncated.description: True when the listing hit the cluster-side line cap (the deployment has more entries than were returned).
